description: Expected DFG output for edge case XES files

edge_cases.name: Single Event
edge_cases.description: Log with only 1 event in 1 trace
comments: DFG should have exactly 1 node, 0 edges
Node is both start and end activity

edge_cases.name: Single Trace (Multiple Events)
edge_cases.description: Log with 1 trace containing multiple events
comments: Single trace provides one execution path

edge_cases.name: Empty Log
edge_cases.description: Log with 0 events (may not be loadable)
comments: Empty logs may raise an error or return empty DFG

edge_cases.name: Single Activity Repeated
edge_cases.description: Log where same activity repeats in sequence
comments: Self-loop represents activity followed by itself
Should be captured as edge A→A with appropriate frequency
